title: alloc_subscription_address burns diversifier on find_address error
description: In alloc_subscription_address, next_diversifier(0) increments the DB counter before find_address() is called. If find_address() returns Err (e.g. a programming error in the dfvk), the diversifier is consumed but no invoice is created. Repeated errors burn the counter. Diversifier space is 2^88 so exhaustion is implausible, but a bug in find_address() that always returns Err would cycle the counter indefinitely. Comment the intentional order or document why it is acceptable.
